validation_rules: Non-empty; max 20 chars; alphanumeric with hyphens allowed; must be consistent across all domains in the study
Non-empty; globally unique subject identifier; format STUDYID-SITEID-SUBJID; max 40 chars
Non-empty; exactly 2 chars uppercase; must be a valid SDTM domain code (DM|AE|LB|VS|CM|EX|MH|DS|SV|TU etc.)
Positive integer; unique within subject and domain; sequential with no gaps; column name must follow --SEQ pattern
Non-negative numeric; must correspond to planned visit in TV domain; decimal allowed for unscheduled visits
ISO 8601 partial or complete datetime; format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss; must not be future date; column name must follow --DTC pattern
Non-empty; max 8 chars uppercase; must match CDISC Controlled Terminology for the domain; column name follows --TESTCD pattern
Original result as collected; max 200 chars; must be populated when STAT is not NOT DONE; column name follows --ORRES pattern
